claimText: UT Austin AI detection guidance says submitting student work into AI detection or other third-party software without a university contract or purchase order may violate student copyright, intellectual property, or FERPA privacy rights.
normalizedValue: AI detection uploads without university contract may implicate student IP/copyright/FERPA rights.

citation.citationTitle: AI Detection Software Guidance - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
